asset_type: TaraHome technical blog article cover and 16:9 library card crop
prompt: Use Image 1 as the official source-backed Home Assistant product reference. Preserve the exact Home Assistant Green hub and Home Assistant Connect ZBT-2 antenna/base physical designs, proportions, translucent and white materials, and believable scale. Create a new clean photorealistic editorial smart-home photograph showing those two exact products together as the clear subject, communicating the decision to add a dedicated Thread radio to Home Assistant Green. Place them on a warm lived-in residential utility shelf or calm home-office console made of natural oak, with soft cream plaster, one restrained dark-green accent, and minimal practical Ethernet and USB cabling. Use a landscape 16:10 product-led medium shot that keeps both devices fully visible near the center for a 16:9 card crop. Use soft natural window light, honest residential texture, realistic shadows, and the restrained Tara palette. No person, laptop screen, phone UI, invented hardware, embedded headline, added logo, watermark, diagram, chart, routing or network line, decorative signal path, translucent panel, inset frame, floating card, progress bar, fake screen, glowing data effect, duplicated device, glossy concept-art polish, or beige device diagram.
